parityMeta.describes: SmartReplacement parity — the readiness-aware path: a low ReadinessResult (level=low, score=52, trainingAdjustment=conservative) trips hasHighFatigueSignal, so low-fatigue squat alternatives are boosted (+reason) while high-fatigue ones are penalised (+warning), and the final sort applies the fatigueRank tiebreak. Pins the readiness/fatigue branch of applyContextScoring.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic SmartReplacementParams over the squat-pattern equivalence chain. The ReadinessResult only needs level/score/trainingAdjustment for hasHighFatigueSignal. Clockless engine, generatedAtPolicy 'none'.
